_comment: Nok brand-mapping configuration for Extensiv IM orders. Three layers of rules run in this order: (1) explicit sku_overrides — SKU -> brand exact match, (2) description_rules — regex match on item Description field (most reliable), (3) sku_rules — regex match on the SKU string itself (fallback for channels like b2b that don't populate Description). Every unique SKU in an export must match at least one rule or the export halts. To add a new brand or correct a mapping, edit this file and re-run. Each rule has `flags` ('i' for case-insensitive) and an optional `note` that explains why the rule exists.

description_rules.note: Ozlo Sleepbuds — only Ozlo product currently shipping.
Oliso M3Pro Project Steam Iron line — 'solemate'/'soulmate' appear in variants.
BioIonic — sold internally as BBI. Match with or without space.
Hatch Rest / Restore — negative lookahead prevents 'hatchback' false positives.
Ember temperature-control mugs. Tight match to avoid e.g. 'September ember' text.
NZXT PC components — winding down, but keep rule for tail orders.
Bissell CA — brand name plus common product lines in EN and FR. Last in list on purpose: product names like 'Little Green' are broad, so higher-priority brands get first shot.

sku_rules.note: Ozlo SleepBuds SKU prefix — e.g. OSBWHT5VWW, FBA-OSBWHT5VWW-A, OSBWHT5VUS-CA-A.
Bio Ionic Long Barrel Styler — only Z-prefixed SKU seen in Nok's feed.

Bissell model-number pattern: 4-digit base with optional letter/variant suffix. Covers marketplace (2513N-B, 3857N-B) and b2b (2986D, 4194N, 39N7J) formats. Letters after the 4 digits encode color/variant/condition.
